answer:
Based on the context, Dmitri Olenin believes happiness can only come to a man who constantly gives to others with no thought of self-gratification. This realization occurs as he tries to suppress his love for Maryanka and instead loves both her and Luka for their simplicity. He demonstrates this belief by giving an extra horse to Luka.

\boxed{\text{constantly gives to others with no thought of self-gratification}}
